failed_cases.description: A TOML settings file loads default and active environment sections.
failed_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p = d / 'settings.toml'
p.write_text('[default]\nname="base"\n[default.service]\nport=1\n[testing.service]\nport=2\nenabled=true\n', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(p), environments=True, env='testing', envvar_prefix='MDU2')
print(s.name, s.service.port, s.service.enabled)

failed_cases.description: Runtime set, update, delete, get, exists, and as_dict operate on local nested state.
failed_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'base', 'pool': {'min': 1}}}, envvar_prefix='MDU4')
s.set('service.port', '2')
s.update({'SERVICE': {'pool': {'max': 4}}})
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['SERVICE'], sort_keys=True))
print(s.delete('service.pool.min'), s.exists('service.pool.min'), s.get('service.pool.max'))

from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, SettingsError
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={}, envvar_prefix='MDU5')

s.set('label', '@str 5')
s.set('payload', '@json {"x": [1, "2"]}')
s.set('nothing', '@none null')
print(type(s.port).__name__, s.port, type(s.label).__name__, s.label)
print(s.payload.x, s.nothing is None)

except SettingsError:

failed_cases.description: Validator defaults, type checks, callable conditions, and failed validated updates are local and atomic.
failed_cases.test_code:
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError
seen = []
def condition(value, settings):
    seen.append((value, settings.service.enabled, settings.get('service.port')))
    return settings.service.enabled and value == settings.service.port
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'enabled': True, 'port': 443}}, envvar_prefix='MDU6', validators=[Validator('service.tls_port', default=443, is_type_of=int, condition=condition)])
print(s.service.tls_port, seen[0][1], seen[0][2])
try:
    s.update({'service': {'tls_port': 80, 'enabled': False}}, validate=True)
except ValidationError:
    print('validation-error')
print(s.service.tls_port, s.service.enabled)
failed_cases.stderr:

failed_cases.description: export returns a deep-copy dictionary and import_dict can overlay or replace runtime state.
failed_cases.test_code:
import json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'base', 'port': 1}}, envvar_prefix='MDU7')
s.import_dict({'service': {'port': '@int 2', 'debug': 'true'}})
copy = s.export(); copy['SERVICE']['HOST'] = 'copy-only'
print(s.service.host, s.service.port, s.service.debug)
s.import_dict({'only': 'runtime'}, replace=True)
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))

failed_cases.description: Defaults, files, env, secrets, validators, runtime update/delete, and export all project one canonical tree without relying on one projection primitive.
failed_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS1_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; local = d / 'local.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'
base.write_text('{"service":{"host":"file","timeout":10},"database":{"host":"file-db","pool":{"max":4}}}', encoding='utf-8')
local.write_text('{"database":{"engine":"postgres","pool":{"min":2}},"feature":{"old":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"service":{"token":"secret"},"database":{"password":"pw"}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS1_SERVICE__TIMEOUT'] = '20'
os.environ['MDS1_SERVICE__ENABLED'] = 'true'
os.environ['MDS1_DATABASE__PORT'] = '5433'
validators = [
    Validator('service.timeout', is_type_of=int, gte=20, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.get('service.enabled') is True and settings.get('database.port') == 5433 and settings.get('database.pool.min') == 2),
    Validator('service.region', default='us', is_type_of=str),
]
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'default', 'retries': 1}, 'database': {'engine': 'sqlite', 'pool': {'min': 1}}}, settings_files=[str(base), str(local)], secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS1', validators=validators)
s.set('service.host', 'runtime-host')
s.update({'database': {'pool': {'max': 9}}}, validate=True)
s.delete('feature.old')
print(s.get('service.host'), s.get('service.timeout'), s.get('service.token'), s.get('service.region'))
print(s.get('database.port'), s.get('database.engine'), s.get('database.pool.min'), s.get('database.pool.max'), s.exists('feature.old'))
print(json.dumps(s.export(), sort_keys=True))

failed_cases.description: Incremental file and dotenv imports join configured sources and are replayed on reload, while runtime overlay and deletions are discarded.
failed_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS3_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; extra = d / 'extra.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'; dotenv = d / '.env'
base.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file1","port":1,"pool":{"min":1,"max":4}},"feature":{"old":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
extra.write_text('{"database":{"port":2,"pool":{"max":8}},"feature":{"extra":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw","port":4}}', encoding='utf-8')
dotenv.write_text('MDS3_DATABASE__POOL__MIN=3\nMDS3_FEATURE__DOTENV=true\n', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db'
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'database': {'engine': 'pg'}, 'feature': {'base': True}}, settings_files=str(base), secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS3')
s.load_file(str(extra))
s.load_env_file(str(dotenv))
s.set('database.pool.max', 16)
s.delete('feature.old')
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True), s.exists('feature.old'), s.get('feature.extra'), s.get('feature.dotenv'))
base.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file2","port":10,"pool":{"min":5,"max":6}},"feature":{"old":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
extra.write_text('{"database":{"port":20,"pool":{"max":10}},"feature":{"extra":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw2","port":40}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db2'
s.reload()
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True))
print(s.get('feature.old'), s.get('feature.extra'), s.get('feature.dotenv'), s.exists('database.pool.max'))

failed_cases.description: Failed validated imports, malformed durable imports, and configure attempts preserve the previous canonical tree and loader lifecycle.
failed_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError, SettingsError
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
good = d / 'good.json'; bad = d / 'bad.json'
good.write_text('{"service":{"port":8000,"host":"stable","enabled":true},"name":"old"}', encoding='utf-8')
bad.write_text('{not-json', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(good), validators=[Validator('service.port', lt=9000, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.get('service.enabled') is True and settings.get('service.host') == 'stable')])
before = json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True)
try:
    s.import_dict({'service': {'port': 99999, 'host': 'changed'}, 'name': 'new'}, validate=True)
except ValidationError:
    print('validation-error')
print(s.get('service.port'), s.get('service.host'), s.get('name'), json.dumps(s.export(), sort_keys=True) == before)
try:
    s.load_file(str(bad), silent=False)
except SettingsError:
    print('load-error')
print(s.get('service.port'), s.get('service.host'), s.get('name'), json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)
try:
    s.configure(settings_files=str(bad))
except SettingsError:
    print('configure-error')
good.write_text('{"service":{"port":8100,"host":"stable","enabled":true},"name":"after"}', encoding='utf-8')
s.reload()
print(s.get('service.port'), s.get('name'))

from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError, SettingsError
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'name': 'app'}, envvar_prefix='MDU1')
print(type(s).__name__)
print(Validator('name').name)
print(issubclass(ValidationError, Exception), issubclass(SettingsError, Exception))

all_cases.description: reload drops runtime-only assignments and configure replaces configured file sources.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
a = d / 'a.json'; b = d / 'b.json'
a.write_text('{"name":"one"}', encoding='utf-8')
b.write_text('{"name":"two"}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(a), envvar_prefix='MDU8')
s.set('runtime', 'x')
s.reload()
print(s.name, s.exists('runtime'))
s.configure(settings_files=str(b), envvar_prefix='MDU8')
print(s.name)

all_cases.description: Defaults, files, env, secrets, validators, runtime update/delete, and export all project one canonical tree without relying on one projection primitive.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS1_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; local = d / 'local.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'
base.write_text('{"service":{"host":"file","timeout":10},"database":{"host":"file-db","pool":{"max":4}}}', encoding='utf-8')
local.write_text('{"database":{"engine":"postgres","pool":{"min":2}},"feature":{"old":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"service":{"token":"secret"},"database":{"password":"pw"}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS1_SERVICE__TIMEOUT'] = '20'
os.environ['MDS1_SERVICE__ENABLED'] = 'true'
os.environ['MDS1_DATABASE__PORT'] = '5433'
validators = [
    Validator('service.timeout', is_type_of=int, gte=20, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.get('service.enabled') is True and settings.get('database.port') == 5433 and settings.get('database.pool.min') == 2),
    Validator('service.region', default='us', is_type_of=str),
]
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'host': 'default', 'retries': 1}, 'database': {'engine': 'sqlite', 'pool': {'min': 1}}}, settings_files=[str(base), str(local)], secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS1', validators=validators)
s.set('service.host', 'runtime-host')
s.update({'database': {'pool': {'max': 9}}}, validate=True)
s.delete('feature.old')
print(s.get('service.host'), s.get('service.timeout'), s.get('service.token'), s.get('service.region'))
print(s.get('database.port'), s.get('database.engine'), s.get('database.pool.min'), s.get('database.pool.max'), s.exists('feature.old'))
print(json.dumps(s.export(), sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: Runtime import, deletion, export to JSON, and reload into a fresh object preserve the same logical state across access and validation views.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'service': {'url': 'http://x', 'retries': 2, 'legacy': 'remove'}, 'features': {'beta': False}})
s.import_dict({'service': {'timeout': 30, 'headers': {'x_trace': 'abc'}}, 'features': {'new_ui': True}}, validate=True)
s.delete('service.legacy')
exported = s.export(); exported['SERVICE']['URL'] = 'copy-only'
p = d / 'roundtrip.json'
s.export(str(p))
reloaded = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(p), validators=[Validator('service.timeout', is_type_of=int, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.get('service.retries') == 2 and settings.get('features.beta') is False and settings.get('features.new_ui') is True)])
print(reloaded.get('service.url'), reloaded.get('service.timeout'), type(reloaded.get('service.timeout')).__name__, reloaded.get('service.headers.x_trace'), reloaded.exists('service.legacy'))
print(json.dumps(reloaded.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))

all_cases.description: Incremental file and dotenv imports join configured sources and are replayed on reload, while runtime overlay and deletions are discarded.
all_cases.test_code:
import os, pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf
for key in list(os.environ):
    if key.startswith('MDS3_'):
        del os.environ[key]
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
base = d / 'base.json'; extra = d / 'extra.json'; secrets = d / 'secrets.json'; dotenv = d / '.env'
base.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file1","port":1,"pool":{"min":1,"max":4}},"feature":{"old":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
extra.write_text('{"database":{"port":2,"pool":{"max":8}},"feature":{"extra":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw","port":4}}', encoding='utf-8')
dotenv.write_text('MDS3_DATABASE__POOL__MIN=3\nMDS3_FEATURE__DOTENV=true\n', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db'
s = MiniDynaconf(defaults={'database': {'engine': 'pg'}, 'feature': {'base': True}}, settings_files=str(base), secrets_files=str(secrets), envvar_prefix='MDS3')
s.load_file(str(extra))
s.load_env_file(str(dotenv))
s.set('database.pool.max', 16)
s.delete('feature.old')
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True), s.exists('feature.old'), s.get('feature.extra'), s.get('feature.dotenv'))
base.write_text('{"database":{"host":"file2","port":10,"pool":{"min":5,"max":6}},"feature":{"old":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
extra.write_text('{"database":{"port":20,"pool":{"max":10}},"feature":{"extra":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
secrets.write_text('{"database":{"password":"pw2","port":40}}', encoding='utf-8')
os.environ['MDS3_DATABASE__HOST'] = 'env-db2'
s.reload()
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict()['DATABASE'], sort_keys=True))
print(s.get('feature.old'), s.get('feature.extra'), s.get('feature.dotenv'), s.exists('database.pool.max'))

all_cases.description: Failed validated imports, malformed durable imports, and configure attempts preserve the previous canonical tree and loader lifecycle.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator, ValidationError, SettingsError
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
good = d / 'good.json'; bad = d / 'bad.json'
good.write_text('{"service":{"port":8000,"host":"stable","enabled":true},"name":"old"}', encoding='utf-8')
bad.write_text('{not-json', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(good), validators=[Validator('service.port', lt=9000, condition=lambda value, settings: settings.get('service.enabled') is True and settings.get('service.host') == 'stable')])
before = json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True)
try:
    s.import_dict({'service': {'port': 99999, 'host': 'changed'}, 'name': 'new'}, validate=True)
except ValidationError:
    print('validation-error')
print(s.get('service.port'), s.get('service.host'), s.get('name'), json.dumps(s.export(), sort_keys=True) == before)
try:
    s.load_file(str(bad), silent=False)
except SettingsError:
    print('load-error')
print(s.get('service.port'), s.get('service.host'), s.get('name'), json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True) == before)
try:
    s.configure(settings_files=str(bad))
except SettingsError:
    print('configure-error')
good.write_text('{"service":{"port":8100,"host":"stable","enabled":true},"name":"after"}', encoding='utf-8')
s.reload()
print(s.get('service.port'), s.get('name'))

configure-error
8100 after

all_cases.description: configure replaces loader state and clears stale incremental imports, runtime overlays, deletion tombstones, validators' derived defaults, and export projections.
all_cases.test_code:
import pathlib, tempfile, json
from minidynaconf import MiniDynaconf, Validator
d = pathlib.Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
a = d / 'a.json'; b = d / 'b.json'; extra = d / 'extra.json'
a.write_text('{"service":{"host":"a","port":1,"keep":"from-a"},"feature":{"old":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
b.write_text('{"service":{"host":"b","port":2},"feature":{"new":true}}', encoding='utf-8')
extra.write_text('{"service":{"extra":"loaded"},"feature":{"old":false}}', encoding='utf-8')
s = MiniDynaconf(settings_files=str(a), validators=[Validator('service.region', default='east')])
s.load_file(str(extra))
s.import_dict({'service': {'port': 9, 'runtime': 'runtime-yes'}})
s.delete('service.keep')
print(json.dumps(s.as_dict(), sort_keys=True))
s.configure(settings_files=str(b), validators=[Validator('service.region', default='west')])
print(s.get('service.host'), s.get('service.port'), s.get('service.region'), s.get('feature.new'))
print(s.exists('service.runtime'), s.exists('service.extra'), s.exists('service.keep'), s.exists('feature.old'))
print(json.dumps(s.export(), sort_keys=True))
